nasb.text: then the one who owns the house shall come and tell the priest, saying, ‘Something like a mark of leprosy has become visible to me in the house.’

esv.text: then he who owns the house shall come and tell the priest, ‘There seems to me to be some case of disease in my house.’

cnv.text: 房主就要去告訴祭司：‘據我看來，房屋中似乎染了病症。’

ccb.text: 屋主必须去告诉祭司，‘我的房子里好像有发霉现象。’
